title: MATANA 24 Premium Plastic Champagne Flutes with Gold Glitter, 150ml - Reusable Champagne Glasses, Plastic Flutes, Prosecco Glasses for Cocktails, Wine, Dessert, Weddings, Birthdays, BBQ, Parties
features: ELEGANCE AND SPARKLE : Elevate your special occasions with these 24 elegant plastic champagne flutes featuring stunning gold glitter accents. Perfect for weddings, birthdays, Christmas celebrations, and more, these flutes add a touch of glamour to any event.

PREMIUM QUALITY, DURABLE & REUSABLE – Made from high-quality, BPA-free plastic, these gold plastic flutes offer the look and feel of real glass without the risk of breakage. Their shatterproof design makes them much safer than glass, especially for outdoor gatherings.

STACKABLE & EASY ASSEMBLY – Designed for convenience, these plastic prosecco glasses can be quickly assembled by attaching the body to the base. Plus, they are stackable when the bases are removed, making storage and transport effortless.

VERSATILE FOR ANY CELEBRATION – Ideal for champagne, sparkling wine, mimosas, cocktails, desserts, and more! Whether it’s a formal wedding, a casual outdoor BBQ, a garden party, or a festive family gathering, these reusable plastic glasses are perfect for any occasion.

EASY TO CLEAN : For long-lasting sparkle, we recommend hand washing these plastic champagne glasses. However, they are also dishwasher safe for added convenience, making cleanup a breeze after any event.
description: Product Description Elegant Design for Any Occasion Whether you're hosting a wedding, birthday party, or casual gathering, our flutes add a touch of sophistication with various styles, from clear to glitter, pink, and gold-rimmed options. Perfect for making any event feel special. Versatile for All Your Favorite Drinks Ideal for serving champagne, wine, cocktails, or even desserts. These flutes are designed to showcase your beverages beautifully, making them the go-to choice for any celebration. Reusable & Washable for Sustainable Use Enjoy your flutes time and time again. These flutes are not only stylish but also durable, reusable, and easy to clean, offering a sustainable solution for your events. BPA-Free & Safe for Every Sip Crafted from premium BPA-free materials, our flutes ensure that every sip is safe and enjoyable, while maintaining the high quality you expect for your celebrations.
